chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.408 of 2023 Engineer Anwer Aleem Versus Province of Sindh and others High Court Appeal No.409 of 2023 Muhammad Anis Uddin Versus Province of Sindh and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection/reply at “A”. 2. For orders on CMA No.5153/2023 (Exemption). 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.5154/2023 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 04.12.2023 Syed Ali Ahmed Zaidi, Advocate for the appellants. Mr. Muhammad Ali, Representative of Respondent No.3 present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for appellants on instructions does not press both these appeals which are accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. Office to place a copy of this order in above connected appeal. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
